mapper.select: SELECT * FROM class_checkin WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM class_checkin WHERE bracelet_id = #{braceletId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY checkin_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM class_checkin WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY checkin_time
SELECT * FROM class_checkin WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY checkin_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_checkin (class_id, student_id, bracelet_id, checkin_time, total_calories, avg_heart_rate, max_heart_rate, duration, status) VALUES (#{classId}, #{studentId}, #{braceletId}, #{checkinTime}, #{totalCalories}, #{avgHeartRate}, #{maxHeartRate}, #{duration}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_checkin SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE class_checkin SET max_heart_rate = #{maxHeartRate}, avg_heart_rate = #{avgHeartRate}, total_calories = #{totalCalories}, duration = #{duration}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
